x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Idea management provides the innovation pipeline Now Assist SPM uses for AI-driven demand scoring and strategic alignment.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure idea management and encourage employees to submit ideas via the ideation portal. Target: 20+ active ideas. Now Assist SPM scores ideas using AI for demand prioritization.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851ccd
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Idea management provides the innovation pipeline Now Assist SPM uses for AI-driven demand scoring and strategic alignment.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Idea Management Configuration</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // im_idea_core is the OOB base table for ideas in SPM — extends task
    // covers all idea configurations regardless of which SPM module is active
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('im_idea_core');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active idea records';

    if (count >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active ideas — Now Assist SPM has sufficient pipeline data for AI demand scoring and prioritization.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active ideas (target: 20+). Now Assist SPM AI demand scoring will have limited innovation pipeline coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active ideas. Now Assist SPM uses ideas for AI-driven demand scoring — low idea volume limits innovation pipeline AI analysis.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>SPM</module>
<number>CHK0006096</number>
<order>50</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure idea management and encourage employees to submit ideas via the ideation portal. Target: 20+ active ideas. Now Assist SPM scores ideas using AI for demand prioritization.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851ccd</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
